=== SAMPLE: ACTIVE World Cup Public Packet (FORECAST ALLOWED) ===

This is the expected public output when:
  lineup_confirmed = true
  model_consumes_lineup = true

Forecast numbers ARE permitted to appear in this state.

Expected packet structure:

🏟️ Algeria vs Austria
Group: Group J
Venue: Kansas City Stadium
Date: 2026-06-27

🟢 Algeria XI: Oussama Benbot, Riyad Mahrez, Amine Gouiri [+ full XI]
🟢 Austria XI: Alexander Schlager, Marko Arnautovic, Marcel Sabitzer [+ full XI]
📊 Standings: [group_standings_note]
🎯 Context: [advancement_context]

Projected goals: Algeria 1.41, Austria 1.19
Projected total: 2.60
Both teams score: 52%

Note: These numbers are rendered ONLY because model_consumes_lineup=true.
If the model had not consumed the confirmed XI, this block would be replaced
with the FORECAST HELD notice and numbers moved to audit artifact only.
